commands: export HOME=/root && git config --global --add safe.directory /opt/pedagolens && cd /opt/pedagolens && git pull origin main 2>&1

echo '=== Fix WP option ===' && php -r "define('ABSPATH','/var/www/html/'); require_once('/var/www/html/wp-load.php'); update_option('pl_bedrock_model_id','us.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-20250514-v1:0'); echo 'Model ID updated to: ' . get_option('pl_bedrock_model_id');" 2>&1
echo '=== Clear debug log ===' && > /var/www/html/wp-content/debug.log && echo 'Log cleared'
systemctl restart apache2 && echo 'Apache restarted OK'
